metadata.description: Memory and instruction optimizer for Claude Code — diagnose, fix, and prevent the behavioral degradation that accumulates over time. 18 frustration pattern catalog, session transcript mining, proactive anti-frustration seeding, escalation to mechanical hooks.

plugins.name: pensieve
plugins.description: 6 skills: /audit (memory + instruction diagnostics), /optimize (apply fixes), /diagnose (mine session transcripts), /capture (drift-proof feedback), /seed (proactive anti-frustration rules), /harden (escalate to hooks)
